nasb.text: I will send hornets ahead of you so that they will drive out the Hivites, the Canaanites, and the Hittites before you.

esv.text: And I will send hornets before you, which shall drive out the Hivites, the Canaanites, and the Hittites from before you.

cnv.text: 我必在你面前打發大黃蜂，把希未人、迦南人、赫人，都從你面前驅逐出去。

ccb.text: 我要派黄蜂做你的先锋，赶走那些希未人、迦南人和赫人。
